title: Junior Support Officer
description_html:
Confirmo is one of the fastest growing crypto payment gateways, and our flexible solutions, low fees, and top-class support make it easy for businesses of all sizes to accept crypto payments. Forbes US named us among the best crypto payment gateways in the world and we don't plan to slow down! Since 2022, we’ve grown 700% in volume and now process over $60M+ monthly.

The role

You don’t need to be a developer or a blockchain engineer. But you must be curious, logical, responsible, and willing to learn how blockchain payments work on a practical, day-to-day level.

You will be joining our Support & Operations team, working directly with Support leadership and closely collaborating with Operations on real customer cases, investigations, and process improvements. We value people who take ownership, communicate clearly, and approach problems with a structured, analytical mindset.

We are a small, fast-moving team. We talk directly, we avoid unnecessary processes, and we rely on each other’s judgment. Support plays a critical role in Confirmo — we assist clients, analyze blockchain transactions, investigate payment issues, test merchant integrations, and help keep our payment infrastructure running smoothly.

If you enjoy tech, crypto, solving real problems, and being part of a focused and cooperative team, you will fit right in.

What You Will Do

  • Communicate with clients via email (Zoho Desk) about payments, invoices, refunds, and general support.
  • Analyze blockchain transactions using explorers (Etherscan, Blockchair, Solscan, etc.).
  • Investigate wrong-network payments, over/underpayments, payout questions, refunds, and edge cases.
  • Test merchant integrations and verify issues.
  • Work closely with the engineering team to report bugs, reproduce issues, and validate fixes.
  • Maintain records, follow internal procedures, and follow SLA expectations.
  • Continuously learn about blockchains, networks, stablecoins, fees, and integrations.


What You Should Bring

  • Strong written English (most communication is in English).
  • Technical curiosity — you want to understand how blockchain payments work.
  • Logical thinking and problem-solving skills.
  • Professional, concise, and friendly communication style.
  • Responsibility and independence — we cannot micromanage.
  • Willingness to learn and adapt quickly.


Nice to have

  • Basic knowledge of crypto (TXIDs, networks, stablecoins).
  • Experience with ticketing tools (Zoho Desk).
  • Experience with e-commerce platforms (WooCommerce).
  • Past experience in technical support, fintech, operations, or IT.
  • Basic understanding of API requests.


What We Offer

  • A role in a stable, profitable startup leading the CZ/SK crypto payments market.
  • A lot of room to grow — technically, operationally, or into senior roles.
  • Flexible working hours + home office possibility.
  • A modern office in Karlín (near metro Křižíkova).
  • A friendly, small, highly technical team.
  • Access to deep knowledge about blockchains, payments, and integrations.
  • Real impact — your work affects clients and merchants every day.

title: Junior Global Web Producer
description_html:
Summary

Join ESET’s global team of digital enthusiasts! We’re driving ESET’s online presence from Japan through United Kingdom to USA and Argentina. Become the specialist in Web Production across diverse set of websites, landing pages, and campaigns – globally.

Job Description

We’re looking for a motivated web specialist with background in frontend technologies – HTML5, CSS3, JS. You’ll be in touch with our Digital, Development, Marketing, Sales, and Product colleagues and have your say in how web initiatives are created, tested, and launched – globally.

We need you to have an eye for detail, yet still see the big picture of digital business. To handle creative and agile assignments while think in terms of processes and patterns in the long run. If you’re data-driven, empathic, creative, and your English is fluent, this might be the position for you.

On top of ESET’s regular employee perks, we offer an engaging, ingenious, and impactful job – globally.

As our Web Producer you will:

  • Upload web content using the global content management system (CMS).
  • Integrate provided content with web design, templates, and best practices.
  • Produce page and element prototypes via prototyping tools, CMS, or HTML/CSS.
  • Create landing pages, supports product/campaign launches, and drive large-scale web updates.
  • Submit feature requests for CMS, cooperate on their prototyping, specification, and acceptance testing.
  • Cooperate with digital specialists and creatives on web production, prototyping, iterations and testing.
  • Publish web changelogs, documents content inventory, and CMS functionality to facilitate smooth content adoption globally.
  • Work closely with other digital teams to improve web UX, conversion rates, performance, and SEO.

The position is a maternity/parental leave cover.

Basic wage component (brutto): from 1700 EUR

Performance bonus 2 times per year up to 10% of the basic salary paid for the evaluation period (usually 6 months).

At ESET, diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) are integral to our corporate culture. Bez čeho se u nás neobejdete

  • Kreativní myšlení, ochota učit se nové věci

Co nabízíme

title: IT Trainee
description_html:
Introduction

A career in IBM Consulting is rooted by long-term relationships and close collaboration with clients across the globe. You'll work with visionaries across multiple industries to improve the hybrid cloud and AI journey for the most innovative and valuable companies in the world. Your ability to accelerate impact and make meaningful change for your clients is enabled by our strategic partner ecosystem and our robust technology platforms across the IBM portfolio

Your Role And Responsibilities

What you can expect?

  • You’ll begin your career learning the basics of IBM Slovakia, working alongside experienced experts on client engagements.
  • Our aim is to help you move as quickly as possible. Your experience duration will be up to 6 months with a subsequent chance to convert into a regular job.
  • Once you have mastered the basics, you’ll develop skills in other IBM processes such as IT solution delivery & design, project management, and methodology, while working with big-name clients where IBM have a significant presence.

You Will Have The Opportunity To

  • Become part of our diverse and multinational community and collaborate with global and local teams
  • Work on real-world-class IT projects for leading companies
  • Gain knowledge and develop skills through on-the-job training
  • Balance your work with your study and enjoy flexible working

Preferred Education

Bachelor's Degree

Required Technical And Professional Expertise

  • Attitude and interest in an IT Engineer/ Specialist / Consultant career
  • Adaptability, Communication, Creative, Problem Solving, Taking Ownership, Teamwork and Collaboration
  • Ability to make decisions, take on responsibilities and have the ability to adapt, change and re-prioritize your plans in a dynamic and fast paced environment
  • English is a must
  • Communicative German is a huge advantage
  • Bachelor’s or expected Master degree (Mathematics, Computer science, Information Technology, Engineering)

title: Data Operation Specialist
description_html:
We are excited to announce that we are looking for two enthusiastic Data Operations Specialists to join our NN Digital Hub in Prague. If you are passionate about financial data and instruments, and eager to grow your career in a supportive and innovative environment, we would love to hear from you! 

Your impact at NN 

Our Master Data Management Team is on the lookout for a motivated and detail-oriented Data Management Operations Specialist. You'll be helping us manage financial instruments and party data, ensuring we stay on top of daily compliance and regulatory reporting for our proprietary assets. 

Our team is made up of operational analysts and specialists who handle the day-to-day data operations that support Finance, Compliance, Risk, and other key stakeholders. 

In this role, you'll be responsible for tasks like setting up financial instruments and legal parties in our internal systems to ensure our financial and risk reporting is spot on. If you have an interest in financial instruments and regulatory frameworks within the insurance sector, you'll fit right in! Plus, you'll get to contribute to process improvements and automation initiatives, all while keeping a strong focus on client needs and data integrity. 

The tasks you will perform 

  • ﻿Execute daily operational tasks related to the setup and maintenance of financial instruments and parties. 
  • Maintain and validate static data in core systems to ensure accuracy and completeness. 
  • Cross-check data between internal platforms and external sources so everything lines up. 
  • Spot gaps, fix them and pitch ideas that make workflows leaner. 
  • Collaborate with stakeholders such as Compliance, Risk, and Finance to ensure data readiness and resolve data quality issues. 
  • Support regulatory disclosures and compliance reporting for proprietary assets. 
  • Manage assigned tasks independently, ensuring deadlines are met with a high degree of accuracy. 
  • Document what you do so the team can follow. 
  • Maintain strong client focus and uphold high standards of customer care. 
  • Communicate effectively and contribute to a collaborative team environment. ﻿ ﻿ 

 

The knowledge and experience you bring 

  • ﻿Degree in Finance, Economics, Business Administration or similar. 
  • ﻿Up to 2 years in financial ops or data management or investment. 
  • ﻿Knowledge of financial instruments, such as bonds, loans, and derivatives. 
  • ﻿Eagle-eye for detail and cool under deadlines. 
  • ﻿Proactive, curious and ready to level up processes. 
  • ﻿Fluent English to chat with anyone in the business. 
  • ﻿Solid PC and data-system skills. 

 

Perks of joining NN 

  • ﻿Enjoy a flexible hybrid work setup—work from home with occasional office meetups, plus monthly support for your home-office costs. 
  • We care about your work–life balance: get 5 weeks of vacation, 5 well-being days, extra paid time off for personal and family events, and a volunteering day to give back. 
  • On top of your salary, you’ll get a meal allowance, up to CZK 20,000 in Cafeteria benefits each year, the option for a MultiSport card, pension contributions, and a discount on life insurance. 
  • We support your growth with tailor-made professional training. 
  • Know someone great? Get up to CZK 60,000 for referring a new colleague. 
  • You’ll get a business laptop and an iPhone with a paid O2 plan and data - everything you need to get started! 

How we hire  

After reviewing your application, including your CV in English, you will receive a short phone call from Erika (Talent Acquisition Specialist) to discuss basic details about your previous work experience and the open position. If everything goes well, we will meet twice in total. The first round will preferably be a face-to-face meeting at our office (or on-line) with Alena (Hiring Manager) and Erika. In the second round, you will meet few of our colleagues from the Netherlands.

title: WW Data Analytics Intern
description_html:
We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.

Lenovo is a US$69 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked #196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full-stack portfolio of AI-enabled, AI-ready, and AI-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992) (ADR: LNVGY).

This transformation together with Lenovo’s world-changing innovation is building a more inclusive, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. To find out more visit www.lenovo.com, and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.

We are seeking a motivatedData Analytics Internto join our Data Analytics Reporting team. This internship offers hands-on experience in SQL, data analysis, and automation to help drive insightful business decisions. You will assist with developing, optimizing, and automating data reporting processes, supporting our teams mission to enhance data accessibility and efficiency across departments.

Responsibilities

  • Design, write, and optimize SQL queries to retrieve, transform, and manipulate data for reporting purposes.
  • Develop automated workflows and scripts to streamline data processing and reporting tasks.
  • Collaborate with team members to identify opportunities for improving data pipeline efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Support the creation of dashboards and reporting tools for real-time analytics using Qlik / Power BI.
  • Troubleshoot data issues, ensure data integrity, and document key processes and workflows.
  • Contribute to team projects aimed at enhancing data quality, governance, and compliance.

Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing a degree in Data Analytics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or any related field.
  • Fluent English.
  • Availability for 20 hours per week.
  • Strong understanding of SQL, data structures, and database concepts.
  • Proficiency with data visualization and analytics tools (e.g., Qlik, Power BI) is a plus, familiarity with programming or scripting languages (e.g., Python) is a plus.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with a keen attention to detail.
  • Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage time effectively.

What Youll Gain

  • Hands-on experience with SQL, automation, and data analytics in a real-world business setting.
  • Exposure to best practices in data reporting, process automation, and workflow optimization.
  • Mentorship from industry professionals in data analytics and reporting.
  • An opportunity to make meaningful contributions to a data-driven team.

What We Offer

  • Schedule: 20 hours per week
  • Salary: 7.00 EUR per hour
  • An open and stimulating environment within one of the most forward thinking IT companies.
  • A modern and flexible way of working to combine personal and professional life
  • An international team with a high focus on Diversity Inclusion

We are looking forward to discussing this position with you soon!

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class.

title: DATOVÝ ANALYTIK – DATA WAREHOUSE & REPORTING
description_html:
RENOMIA – středoevropská jednička v pojišťovnictví hledá nové talenty! Jsme největší pojišťovací makléř a firma orientovaná na Risk managment u našich klientů, v České republice. Na trhu působíme 32 let a kanceláře máme ve 13 zemích regionu CEE. Partnerství s akcionářsky spřízněnou společností Gallagher, třetím největším globálním pojišťovacím makléřem, nám umožňuje poskytovat služby po celém světě. Díky unikátnímu spojení hodnot rodinné firmy a mezinárodního know-how nabízíme jedinečné pracovní prostředí a stabilní zázemí. Připojte se k nám a staňte se součástí příběhu, který mění svět pojišťovnictví!

Chceš pracovat s daty, která mají skutečný dopad na rozhodování firmy? Baví tě kombinace analytického myšlení, moderních technologií a hledání hodnoty v číslech? Pak hledáme právě tebe!

🚀 Co Tě u Nás Čeká

  • Budeš součástí BI týmu, který tvoří datové srdce naší firmy
  • Práce s datovým skladem a jeho rozvojem – od návrhu až po optimalizaci
  • Tvorba interaktivních reportů a dashboardů v Power BI, které pomáhají businessu k lepším rozhodnutím
  • Near-realtime datová analýza, emebedování reportů do aplikací a zapojení agentních systémů do reportingu
  • Transformace a modelování dat v BigQuery a DBT
  • Spolupráce s kolegy napříč firmou na definici a realizaci datových potřeb
  • Monitoring kvality dat a hledání cest, jak zlepšit naši datovou infrastrukturu
  • Zapojení do DevOps procesů (verzování, CI/CD, deployment modelů)

🛠️ S čím u nás budeš pracovat

  • Power BI – vizualizace a reporting
  • Google BigQuery – analýza velkých datových sad pomocí SQL
  • DBT (Data Build Tool) – transformace a dokumentace datových pipeline
  • DevOps základy – Git, CI/CD, deployment

🌟 Koho hledáme

  • Máš zkušenosti s datovými sklady a SQL
  • Ideálně už umíš pracovat s Power BI, BigQuery nebo DBT – pokud ne, nevadí, důležitá je chuť se učit
  • Zajímá tě AI a moderní technologie v datovém světě
  • Jsi analytický typ, který rád hledá souvislosti a navrhuje řešení
  • Nechybí ti samostatnost, zodpovědnost a schopnost spolupráce v týmu

💡 Proč k nám

  • Práce na smysluplných projektech, kde tvoje analýzy uvidíš v reálném byznysovém dopadu
  • Možnost učit se od zkušeného BI týmu a rozvíjet se v nejmodernějších technologiích
  • Prostředí, kde se podporuje inovace, otevřenost a sdílení nápadů
  • Stabilní firma s vizí, kde se spojuje profesionalita s lidským přístupem

Naše benefity – proč u nás budete chtít pracovat?

  • Zázemí lídra na trhu. Jsme stabilní česká společnost s nadnárodním dosahem. Na trhu působíme už od roku 1993 a jsme jedničkou ve svém oboru. Naši klienti se na nás spoléhají díky profesionálním službám a odbornosti.
  • Skvělé prostředí, kde vládne férovost a lidský přístup. Na Atmoskopu 87 % zaměstnanců oceňuje své kolegy a 85 % své nadřízené. Otevřená komunikace a týmová spolupráce nejsou jen fráze – opravdu to tu žijeme.
  • Flexibilita na prvním místě. Pracujte tak, jak vám to vyhovuje – kombinujeme 3 dny v kanceláři a 2 dny na Home Office. Flexibilní pracovní doba vám navíc umožní přizpůsobit den vašim potřebám (v kanceláři od 9:00 do 16:00, zbytek času je vás).
  • Více volna, více času na sebe a rodinu. Máme 5 týdnů dovolené a navíc 3 extra dny na rodinu (Family Days). K tomu přidáváme den volna na dobrovolnictví nebo podporu vaší dobročinné aktivity prostřednictvím grantu až 15 000 Kč.
  • Odpočinek i zábava. V naší Cafeterii najdete ročně 10 200 bodů (1 bod = 1 Kč) na dovolenou, sport, kulturu nebo volný čas. Stravenky jsou samozřejmostí (130 Kč na den) a můžete se těšit i na dotovanou Multisport kartu.
  • Odměňujeme loajalitu i úspěchy. Dvakrát ročně získáte odměnu za vaše výsledky (13. a 14. mzda). K tomu přidáváme věrnostní bonusy za odpracované roky a opravdu atraktivní odměnu za doporučení nového kolegy/kolegyně.
  • Výhodné produkty, které vám usnadní život. Nabízíme zvýhodněné podmínky u našich partnerských služeb – od hypoték přes cestovní pojištění, pojištění nemovitosti nebo auta, až po leasing. A přispíváme na doplňkové penzijní spoření až 30 000 Kč ročně.
  • Moderní kanceláře v srdci Prahy. Naše prostory nejen skvěle vypadají, ale jsou i pohodlné a plné života.
  • Podpora vzdělávání a kariérního růstu. Záleží nám na vašem profesním i osobním rozvoji. Zajistíme vám odborné kurzy, certifikace nebo plně hrazené jazykové vzdělávání. Ať už chcete růst horizontálně nebo vertikálně, máte u nás prostor.
  • Přátelská atmosféra na firemních akcích. Těšte se na sportovní aktivity, týmové výjezdy nebo celofiremní setkání. A Mikuláš? To je už naše tradice.

Pokud vás to zaujalo, těšíme se na vaše CV! Podívejte se na náš profil na Atmoskopu, kde najdete další detaily i pohled zaměstnanců: Atmoskop – RENOMIA.

O pobočce

Staňte se součástí příběhu RENOMIA – rodinné firmy s vizí, kde kancelář není jen místem, ale centrem spolupráce.

Jaké to v RENOMIA je? Jak fungujeme? Pro někoho „jen kancelář“. Pro nás prostor, kde vznikají nápady a strategie, které přinášejí jistotu klientům. Přidejte se k nám a staňte se součástí české rodinné firmy se silným mezinárodním zázemím.

title: Junior Data Scientist
description_html:
Our opportunity

Junior Data Scientist – ideal for fresh graduates!

We have data.

We have cutting-edge technology and analytics tools.

We need an enthusiastic individual to deal with business challenges and make a difference.

We need an extra pair of hands and creative mind in our young dynamic team.

Interested? Give it a try. We need you!

Your role

As a Junior Data Scientist, your main tasks will involve:

  • Understand business problems and structure analytical approaches to solve them.
  • Generate proofs of concept from data that help deliver improved business results.
  • Prepare and pre-process datasets needed to deliver analytical solutions.
  • Generate distinctive risk insights that deliver improved business results.
  • Build and implement predictive models and other analytical solutions using both structured and unstructured data.
  • Collaborate with Data Engineers to deploy models into production environments and monitor models performance.
  • Support communication of findings, implications, and performance of the models to business stakeholders.

Your Skills And Experience

As a Junior Data Scientist, your skills and experience will ideally include:

  • University education (Bachelor’s degree or higher).
  • Ideal for fresh graduates or students finishing their degree.
  • Working knowledge of Python and basic data science packages.
  • Passion working with data and developing insights for use in business decisions.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and analytical thinking.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills, especially the ability to translate technical results for business audiences.
  • English – B2 or better.
  • Experience with Azure and Databricks is an advantage.
  • Experience with basic NLP concepts and large language models is an advantage.
  • Experience with SQL and other programming languages is an advantage.

We offer

In accordance with the EU Pay Transparency Directive, the minimum gross annual compensation for this position, determined based on objective and gender-neutral criteria, is 1 880 EUR/gross. The final compensation package will depend on the candidate’s qualifications and relevant experience.

On top of a competitive annual bonus, we offer a comprehensive benefits package that includes:

Working Time Benefits

Personal days off, Concentrated work week, Additional vacation, Home office, Extra days off at occasion of childbirth, Sabbatical leave

Monetary Benefits

Life insurance from Zurich Austria, Compensation for salary loss during sick leave, 3rd pension pillar contribution, Risk Life Insurance, Meal contribution on top of the legally required minimum, Years of service bonus, Wedding bonus, Baby bonus

Other Benefits

Edenred electronic cafeteria, Public Transport contribution, Maternity leave benefits, Company and team events, Free parking at the office building, Massages in the office

Learning/Development

Professional Certifications, Online Education Portals, Extensive Onboarding program, Strengths based culture (GALLUP)

  • Location(s): Bratislava office or Kosice co-working space
  • Hybrid work: We would be happy to meet you in the office/ co-working space 3 times a week with the added flexibility of working from home on a weekly basis.
  • Schedule: Full-time

About Us

At our company, we recognize the importance of fostering an open-minded, safe and inclusive environment for everyone. We stand with diversity and respect different backgrounds and lifestyles. That's why we've implemented numerous initiatives to ensure our employees feel comfortable, accepted and respected at all times.

title: Intern - Masters Systems Eng
description_html:
Job Description

As an Intern Systems Engineer here at Honeywell, you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects and gain hands-on experience in systems engineering. You will collaborate with experienced engineers and contribute to the design, development, and implementation of advanced systems and technologies. This internship will provide you with valuable insights into the industry and help you develop the skills needed for a successful career in systems engineering.

In this role, you will impact the development of innovative systems and technologies that enhance the performance and reliability of our products. Your contributions will support the successful execution of projects and help drive the company's growth and success.

At Honeywell, our people leaders play a critical role in developing and supporting our employees to help them perform at their best and drive change across the company. Help to build a strong, diverse team by recruiting talent, identifying, and developing successors, driving retention and engagement, and fostering an inclusive culture.

Key Responsibilities

  • Requirement analysis and decomposition
  • Flight Controls, Flight Guidance, Autopilot, Virtual Guidance Panel or Maintenance Systems design
  • Model based development
  • Systems integration
  • Systems validation & verification
  • Work with other systems/software engineers during developing and integrating solutions for Honeywell Anthem product as well as for Honeywell customers

Key Skills And Qualifications

  • Ability to work 20 hours per week.
  • Undergoing or having finished a degree in Electrical Engineering/Controls Systems/Mechatronics/Aeronautical Studies
  • A good command of English language is mandatory.
  • Good hardware knowledge, electronic circuits and connections (skilled in Matlab/Simulink would be a plus)
  • Knowledge of programming languages is a benefit (e.g. C, Python).
  • Self–starter, motivated, proactive and able to work without supervision.

Our Offer

  • Start your career in globally recognized company by developing future technologies.
  • Possibility to accommodate your studies with work commitments.
  • Long-term cooperation even after finishing of your studies.
  • Market-specific training and ongoing personal and professional development with support of experienced engineers and leaders.
  • Semi-flexible working hours.
  • As a University Relations program, you can also expect Career Growth and Skill Development: Clear pathways for advancement, regular feedback, mentorship opportunities and access to training and certifications.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform crucial job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

Join us now and become part of our journey - help us make the future!

#FutureShaper

About Us

Honeywell helps organizations solve the world's most complex challenges in automation, the future of aviation and energy transition. As a trusted partner, we provide actionable solutions and innovation through our Aerospace Technologies, Building Automation, Energy and Sustainability Solutions, and Industrial Automation business segments – powered by our Honeywell Forge software – that help make the world smarter, safer and more sustainable.

title: IT Specialista podpory mobilního bankovnictví - junior
description_html:
Hledáme kolegyni či kolegu, který nebo která by podporoval/a provoz API řešení určené pro moderní retailovou mobilní aplikaci ČSOB Smart.

V této pozice velmi rádi zaučíme juniorního člověka.

Náš Mobile tým je DEVOPS útvar, kde spojujeme svět businessu, vývoje a provozu pro jednu z nejlepších mobilních aplikací v České republice v sektoru financí.

 

Na co se u nás můžete těšit?

Vítáme diverzitu, ohleduplnost, spolehlivost, respekt a otevřené jednání.

Chyby bereme jako příležitost a šanci dělat věci jinak, pracujeme se zpětnou vazbou, nasloucháme, naše kroky děláme vždy primárně s ohledem na klienta.

Věci dotahujeme, soustředíme se na řešení a výsledek, přijímáme osobní odpovědnost a nezapomínáme na náš profesní a osobní růst.

Spolupracujeme s ostatními provozními, IT i BUS týmy.

 

Primárně technická agenda:

  • Budete instalovat aplikační změny, patche a podílet se na releasech a projektech
  • Konfigurovat a ladit API servery pro hladký běh aplikací a dohlížet na bezproblémový provoz
  • Řešit provozní incidenty a poskytovat podporu při jejich řešení v rámci zadaných SLA
  • Implementovat politiky dle bezpečnostních standardů nebo auditů na daných serverech

 

Ve svěřené správě budete mít:

  • E2E monitoring a rozbor provozních logů
  • Práci na API řešení – nasazování změnových softwarových úprav, kontrolu provozu a performance
  • Hlídání metrik jednotlivých služeb, identifikaci provozních anomálií ze systémových logů i provozních grafů
  • Drobné provozní skriptování zahrnující správu terminal serverů, update Javy, správu Cronu nebo třeba archivaci
  • Správu certifikátů, dokumentaci provozní zátěže a nárazově přípravu dokumentů pro bezpečnostní komisi
  • Optimalizování procesů při nestandardních stavech, např. nárůstu responzí se sledovanými http statusovými kódy


Bez čeho se u nás neobejdete

  • Technických zkušeností s Linux/Unix platformou
  • Flexibility – provoz aplikací vyžaduje ochotu a časovou pružnost, včetně střídavého držení nočních pohotovostí
  • Komunikativnosti, týmovosti (zastupování kolegů) a proklientského přístupu
  • Hodit se bude i znalost SQL dotazů
  • Znalosti ticketovacího systému ServiceNow (výhodou)
 

Co nabízíme

  • 5 týdnů dovolené
  • Multisportka
  • Příspěvek na životní a penzijní pojištění
  • 7 dnů volna
  • E-stravenky v hodnotě 170 Kč/den
  • Zvýhodněné produkty a finanční služby
  • Flexibilní pracovní prostředí
  • Cafeterie s 12 000 body/rok
  • Osobní a profesní rozvoj napříč skupinou
  • Péče o duševní zdraví
  • Program pro rodiče /55+ /OZP,OZZ
  • Sportovní aktivity - Bankovní hry a další

title: ITSM Consultant for ServiceNow - Prague
description_html:
Devoteam is an AI-driven tech consulting firm specialising in cloud platforms, cybersecurity, data, and sustainability.

Tech native for almost 30 years, Devoteam guides businesses through sustainable digital transformation to deliver value.

With over 11,000 tech architects in more than 25 countries across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, Devoteam is committed to using technology to serve people.

Devoteam has been a ServiceNow Elite Partner since 2019, and recipient of the 2025 Partner of the Year award.

Job Description

What can you expect from this position?

Are you passionate about IT consulting and eager to kick-start your career in the field? If so, the ITSM Consultant role may be the perfect opportunity for you. As a Consultant, you'll have the chance to learn and grow alongside experienced professionals, developing your skills and becoming a key asset to our team.

As a ITSM Consultant, your primary responsibilities will include:

  • Implementing ServiceNow solutions, gaining hands-on experience with the platform.
  • Learning the ins and outs of ServiceNow, including configuration, customization, and best practices.
  • Collaborating with team members to gather client requirements and assist in the development of tailored ServiceNow solutions.
  • Supporting pre-sales activities by contributing to presentations, workshops, and proposals.
  • Participating in client meetings, helping to identify their needs and providing valuable insights.


Your role will be pivotal in helping our team deliver exceptional ServiceNow solutions to our clients. While technical skills are essential, we also value your ability to communicate effectively, build relationships, and work collaboratively.

Join us in the exciting world of ServiceNow, where you can begin your career journey and make a positive impact on our team and clients alike. We believe in fostering innovation and teamwork, and you'll be an integral part of that vision.

What can you expect from working at Devoteam?

  • The opportunity to enhance and expand your skills and competences.
  • Guidance and support from experienced senior colleagues.
  • Are you seeking a company where you can connect with like-minded individuals and socialize outside of work? Look no further!
  • Feel free to check out our Cocuma page or explore the Benefits and perks section below for more information.


Qualifications

  • Strong soft skills, including communication and presentation abilities, analytical thinking and troubleshooting skills.

We’d definitely welcome…

title: ITOM/CMDB Specialist - Prague
description_html:
Devoteam is an AI-driven tech consulting firm specialising in cloud platforms, cybersecurity, data, and sustainability.

Tech native for almost 30 years, Devoteam guides businesses through sustainable digital transformation to deliver value.

With over 11,000 tech architects in more than 25 countries across Europe, the Middle East, and Africa, Devoteam is committed to using technology to serve people.

Devoteam has been a ServiceNow Elite Partner since 2019, and recipient of the 2025 Partner of the Year award.

Job Description

Devoteam is looking for a ServiceNow specialist for the CMDB and IT Operations Management implementations. You will communicate with customers, based on understanding of the customer demand you will detail the technical requirements and validate them with the customer. You should have a strong background in infrastructure technologies and at minimum admin level of knowledge of server operating systems. Knowledge of monitoring, network and server automation tools, cloud environments like Azure, GCP, AWS is a plus. You are expected to understand the basics of Javascript, Powershell or others.

Your main duties will be:

Discovery of IT components data and storing them in CMDB

  • Best practices for data population, identification and reconciliation
  • Live discovery via ServiceNow tooling and 3rd party integrations


Network Operations & Troubleshooting:

  • Take ownership of network connectivity troubleshooting, collaborating with network engineers, security teams or cloud providers.
  • Discovery of network devices (routers, switches, firewalls, NAT, load balancers).
  • Diagnose and resolve network protocol issues (HTTP, TCP, SOAP, REST, SSH, SNMP).


Security & Credential Management:

  • Manage credentials, adhering to security best practices.
  • Implement and troubleshoot SSL/PKI certificates for secure communication.


Infrastructure Discovery:

  • Maintain a comprehensive understanding of IT infrastructure topology, including applications, servers, and networking components.
  • Provide support for web and application servers discovery (WebSphere, MQ, IIS, Apache), load balancers, databases, and virtualization platforms (VMware).
  • Take responsibility for discovery of all of the listed infrastructure.


Advanced Network Management & Troubleshooting:

  • Take ownership of advanced network troubleshooting, including IP packet analysis and routing protocol diagnostics (CCNA level).
  • Implement and manage subnetting and IP transit solutions.


ServiceNow Administration:

  • Manage and configure ServiceNow instances, utilizing CSA-level knowledge.


Advanced Server Administration & Automation:

  • Provide support for advanced server administration across diverse OS platforms, including domain structures, user permissions, group policy objects, and SUDO policies.
  • Develop and maintain automation scripts using JavaScript, Unix Shell, Windows PowerShell, XML, JSON, and Regular Expressions (RegEx), osquery


Network Monitoring Integrations:

  • Set-up and maintain integration to network monitoring tools (Dynatrace, SCOM, Netcool, Solarwinds, HPOM).


ITIL & Service Management:

  • Implement and maintain ITIL CMDB models.
  • Apply ITILv3/v4 Foundations principles to service management processes.
  • Understand and support business applications within the ITIL framework.


Cloud Infrastructure Management:

  • Manage and support cloud infrastructure on platforms such as Amazon EC2, Azure, and Google GCP.


Scripting and Automation:

  • Create and maintain scripts to automate tasks.


Qualifications

Must have:

  • Intermediate Windows and Unix administration skills
  • Familiarity with network concepts (routers, switches, firewalls, NAT, load balancing)
  • Ability to discuss credentials, install a product, troubleshoot permission issues, discuss and troubleshoot network connectivity with network engineers, security teams or cloud providers
  • General knowledge of IT infrastructure topology including typical application, server, and networking configurations, Web and Application Servers, Load Balancers, Databases, and Virtualisation (WebSphere, MQ, IIS, Apache, VMware)
  • Understanding of DNS and IP configuration and protocols such as HTTP, TCP, SOAP, REST, SSH and SNMP
  • Understanding of SSL / PKI


Good to have:

  • ‘CCNA’ or equivalent level of networking knowledge to include routing protocols, TCP/UDP transmission, IP transit diagnosis, sub-netting and implement advanced troubleshooting including the ability to gather and analyze IP packet level data.
  • ServiceNow CSA level
  • Advanced knowledge and ability in Server Administration across OS platforms. Including the understanding of described domain structures, user permission levels, group policy objects and the execution of SUDO Policies.
  • Experience with network monitoring toolsets, such as Dynatrace, SCOM, Netcool, Nagios, Solarwinds and HPOM.
  • Deeper understanding of SNMP traps & MIBs/OIDs.
  • Ability to comprehend, modify and create server-side object-oriented JavaScript, Unix Shell scripting, Windows and PowerShell scripting, XML, JSON, Regular Expressions (RegEx), JEA configurations
  • Understanding of Business Applications and their functionality in the ITIL model
  • Comprehension of and the ability to communicate and implement the ITIL CMDB Model
  • Familiarity with Amazon EC2, Azure, Google GCP and VMware
  • ITILv3/v4 Foundations


Additional Information

What will you get apart from the salary?

Benefits

  • 5 weeks of vacation per year (= 1 week extra)
  • 4 My Days per year
  • Hybrid office
  • Flexible working hours
  • Career Management, training and certifications in the best breed of technologies - focused on technical skills (ServiceNow, Google), Project Management methodology etc., including Udemy for business account.
  • Meal allowance up to 28.000 CZK/year (123,90 CZK/day)
  • Cafeteria 1000 CZK/month (MultiSport Card available)
  • Phone tariff (unlimited calls, texts messages within the EU, 20GB of Internet)

title: Cloud Infrastructure & Security Engineer Junior
description_html:
CLOUD INFRASTRUCTURE & SECURITY ENGINEER JUNIOR



Chcete pracovat v inovativní a neustále se rozvíjející společnosti s českými kořeny, která úspěšně zamířila na světové trhy?

Do našeho týmu hledáme posilu, která bude vykonávat rozvojové práce v cloud prostředí identifikovaném seniorním kolegou. Budete provádět údržbu, optimalizaci a rozvoj cloudového prostředí, včetně kooperace na rozvojových projektech realizovaných dalšími IT odděleními. Budete zajišťovat dodržování governance v cloudovém prostředí a identifikovat chybějící místa v governance. Budete předkládat návrhy pro rozvoj a doplnění cloudové infrastruktury.


Co Vás na této pozici nemine?

  • Kooperace s Cloud Infrastructure & Security Engineer Seniorem na identifikaci nezbytných prací v cloud prostředí
  • Implementace identifikovaných prací pod dohledem seniorního kolegy v souladu s požadavky IT managementu
  • Monitoring cloud prostředí pro zvýšení výkonu a optimalizaci
  • Kooperace se seniorním kolegou a dodavateli na identifikaci komponent, které budou nahrazeny novější infrastrukturu a plánování a realizace přechodu na nové technologie
  • Implementace a dodržování security v cloud prostředí, včetně aplikování na projekty ostatních IT oddělení
  • Vypracování a údržba nezbytné dokumentace governance a dalších, včetně dokumentace požadované zákonem o kyberbezpečnosti a jejich aplikace a vyžadování od třetích stran při realizaci projektů
  • Participace na projektech ostatních IT oddělení a také ostatních IT infrastrukturních projektech
  • Realizace přidělené práce v pracovních nástrojích dle definovaných SLA
  • Kooperace s externími partnery na přidělených úkolech, v nezbytných případech jejich řízení
  • Kooperace se SOC (Security Operations Center) týmem při udržování bezpečnosti IT prostředí LINET Group

Co čekáme od Vás?

  • SŠ/VŠ vzdělání nejlépe IT směru
  • Plynulá znalost anglického jazyka – vedení jednání, čtení a psaní odborných textů
  • Znalost cloud prostředí – MS Azure
  • Znalost cloud nástrojů – MS Deffender, O365, Windows server – poslední 3 verze, MS Sentinel
  • Schopnost vést dokumentaci v rámci NIS 2 i mimo – MS Deffender, MS Teams, Markdown
  • Schopnost komunikace a prezentace s různými interními nebo externími zákazníky
  • Schopnost analyzovat a řešit problémy a schopnost prioritizace
  • Schopnost samostatného dohledávání informací a samovzdělávání

Co Vám za to můžeme nabídnout my?

  • Zázemí mezinárodní úspěšné a neustále se rozvíjející společnosti
  • Možnost profesního a kariérního růstu
  • Pestrou paletu zaměstnaneckých benefitů (flexi pracovní doba, kafetérie, 13. plat, dovolená navíc, sportování, stravenky, Multisport karta, penzijní připojištění atd....)
  • Skvělý pracovní kolektiv


Pokud vás tato pozice zaujala, pošlete nám životopis.

title: Apian Developer
description_html:
Job description:

#GreatWorkIsNotAMyth

 

Our team at KBC GS Business Solution Competence Center provides direct support to business end users through data automation, report creation, maintenance of existing code, and the development of new applications. We work with a variety of technologies, including Appian, Pega, RPA, SAS, VBA Macros, SQL, MS Access, Mainframe, Web2PY, Power Apps, and QlikSense, among others.

We are currently seeking a developer to join our Appian team. If you are passionate about innovative solutions and eager to contribute to impactful projects in a collaborative environment, we would love to hear from you.

About the role:

As a developer on the Appian team, you will:

  • Take part in end-to-end implementation, ongoing problem-solving, maintenance, and support for agile software solutions.
  • Work across diverse business domains, technologies, and collaboration models.
  • Be part of a large, international, and distributed team, where daily communication takes place in English.

This role offers the opportunity to contribute to impactful projects in a dynamic environment, collaborating with colleagues from various backgrounds. 

Responsibilities:
  • Perform various software engineering activities related to business requirements, functional design, technical design, development, application integration, package configuration, testing, deployment, and other software-related development activities.
  • Maintain, monitor, and manage systems and applications, paying extra attention to performance, quality, and security.
  • Document and build personal knowledge of software solutions and methodologies/frameworks for software design and development via continuous learning. Contribute actively to the learning organization through communities of practice, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing sessions.
  • Follow market evolutions within the assigned applications, solutions, and software frameworks (including their interfaces) and advise on the functionality of new developments.
Key competences that will help you succeed:

Advanced Software Engineering Practice:

  • Software Development Life Cycle: Knowledge of the software development life cycle; ability to use a structured methodology for delivering and managing new or enhanced software to our internal partners within KBC.
  • Software Quality Assurance and Testing: Knowledge of software quality assurance and testing; ability to apply appropriate processes, tools, and techniques to ensure a high level of quality in computer software products and systems.
  • IT Standards, Procedures & Policies: Knowledge of Information Technology (IT) standards and policies; ability to utilize a variety of administrative skill sets and technical knowledge to manage organizational IT policies (with a focus on security requirements).

Agile Methodologies:

  • Knowledge of concepts and principles of agile methodologies, specifically SAFe and Scrum.

Language skills:

  • Advanced level of spoken and written English, with the ability to effectively communicate with different stakeholders.
The following skills and competencies are considered an advantage:
  • Experience with Appian or other low-code or automation platforms.
  • Unix server knowledge.
  • Advanced SQL knowledge (Oracle SQL).
  • Basic knowledge of BPMN.
  • Experience with integrations and APIs.
  • Active experience with Atlassian tools.
3 things you’ll love about KBC Global Services: 

#1 Work-life balance for real. Forget overtime and working while sleeping! We empower all employees, including parents and young professionals, juggling careers, studies and hobbies. 
#2 Stability. KBC Group includes the Czech ČSOB, the Belgian KBC, the Hungarian K&H, and more. We’ve been based in Prague since 2021 and offer you room for growth. 
#3 International environment full of easy-going colleagues.  

What you get:

•    Bonuses twice a year based on your performance .
•    Hybrid working mode with the possibility to work 50% from home. Our core working hours are from 9 am to 3 pm.
•    28 days off per year to recharge.
•    Opportunities for business trips to Belgium (to our KBC Group headquarters).
•    Many benefits fully paid by us - Multisport card, learning courses, meal voucher card (170 CZK/day), Cafeteria benefit system, fruit and ice cream days.
•    Referral bonuses.
•    Contribution to pension and life insurance, great deals on ČSOB products and much more.

title: Junior Data Engineer
description_html:
Career Area

Technology, Digital and Data

Job Description

Your Work Shapes the World at Caterpillar Inc.

When you join Caterpillar, you're joining a global team who cares not just about the work we do – but also about each other. We are the makers, problem solvers, and future world builders who are creating stronger, more sustainable communities. We don't just talk about progress and innovation here – we make it happen, with our customers, where we work and live. Together, we are building a better world, so we can all enjoy living in it.

Who is CAT Digital? What do we do?

Big machines require big thinking. Are you looking for your next big challenge?

Cat® Digital is the digital and technology arm of Caterpillar Inc., leveraging the latest technologies to build industry leading digital solutions for our customers and dealers. With over one million connected assets worldwide, our teams use data, technology, advanced analytics, telematics, and AI capabilities to help our customers build a better world.

Working with a Fortune 100 leader, you can build your career on a global scale and take advantage of development opportunities with emerging technologies. We’ve created an inclusive environment for you to explore your passions, make an impact and do the work that really matters. Join Us.

Job Opportunity

Cat Digital is expanding its operations and opening a new branch in Slovakia. We are seeking talented individuals to join our team to help us establish and grow our presence, organization, culture, which will drive our digital product development efforts. As a member of our team, you will have the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies and collaborate with top professionals working on very high impact and visibility products. Don't miss this chance to join and support digital innovation for a global leader in heavy machinery!

What will you do?

Responsibilities

As a Junior Data Engineer at Cat Digital's new Slovakian branch, you will contribute to design, development and deployment of Caterpillar’s state of the art digital program. You will be responsible for:

  • Development of applications, project management, and complex assignments.
  • Development of application focused around delivering business valuable features.
  • Assist other engineers, providing technical assistance and colaboration.
  • Guiding the team to developing a structured code, new program documentation, operations, documentation, and user guides.
  • Performing integrated testing to ensure timely, quality results.

This position works directly with Slovakia based engineering leadership and Cat Digital IT in the US.

What You Have

  • Knowledge of technical aspects of a software products; ability to design, configure and integrate technical aspects of software products.

title: Software Engineer - fresh graduate
description_html:
Job Description

The NetSuite Application Team:

Do you want to advance your career with the world’s first cloud company? Since 1998, Oracle NetSuite has been on a mission to deliver an agile, unified application suite that gives leaders a complete view into their business. Our team is growing, and we’re looking for people like you to help us make a global impact.

As the leading cloud business system, NetSuite includes financials, inventory management, HR, professional services automation, commerce, and more. Tens of thousands of customers all over the world trust NetSuite to give their businesses the visibility, agility, and control needed to make data-informed decisions quickly.

NetSuite is a place where you can build your career and have fun while doing so! We’re invested in our people, our customers, and the community. As part of Oracle, our benefits are exceptional. Joining our passionate team means that you’re ready to take your career to the next level. With priceless learning opportunities, strong support, incredible innovation, and volunteer opportunities, NetSuite is committed to creating a workplace where everyone feels empowered and set up for success.

The Program:

This is a rotational program that consists of several weeks of NetSuite specific onboarding followed by two 6-month team assignments on different teams at the Prague office, culminating in a final team placement. This is a hybrid role requiring a certain number of days in the office, as determined by your team. You will receive exposure to different aspects of the product and/or code base. You will have 10 or so knowledge expansion sessions from security to tech writing to growth, any type of technical program position - either via Zoom or in person. You will also receive opportunities to network with leadership in addition to a mentor.

Our future success depends on hiring world-class, early in career talent who are looking to power next-generation services and solutions. We are hiring bachelor’s and master’s graduates with a diverse set of skills and experiences to work in and across multiple teams within the NetSuite global industry unit. Our program is intended to enhance your overall learning experience, help build your network, and accelerate your chance to create an impact.

What You’ll Do:

We are seeking best-in-class Software Engineer interested in innovative front-end or full-stack web development with a passion for Quality who will join us at Oracle NetSuite in Prague and who is finishing university this academic year, 2025-2026, without any full-time work experience. You will use your knowledge and creativity to craft and build innovative new systems all the way from requirement definition through design, implementation, testing to deployment and bugfixing. Successful candidates will also be passionate about clean code, quality, and SOLID principles. You will have the opportunity to work on groundbreaking technologies to tackle real-world problems in a collaborative, agile environment.

What You’ll Bring (Objective Minimum Qualifications):

  • Computer Science degree (Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math).
  • Hybrid working model: minimum 3 days in the office, dependent on the teams committed structure.
  • Front-end coding skills: Javascript/ECMAScript; desired TypeScript, React, HTML, CSS.
  • Back-end coding skills: mandatory any object-oriented language (e.g. Java, C#, Python, Kotlin); desired any unit testing framework.
  • Intimate understanding of modern web applications and database-driven applications such as SQL. Optionally, knowledge or experience with ORM framework.
  • Great problem-solving skills and the ability to abstract functional requirements and strong communication abilities in both technical and non-technical contexts.
  • Analytical thinker who wants to work in a team environment and develop and grow their skills.
  • Embodiment of our Values: Customer First, Collaboration, Innovation, and Integrity.
  • Other desired skills: Git; any testing framework or methodology; any Agile methodology


At Oracle, we don’t just respect differences—we celebrate them. We believe that innovation starts with inclusion and to create the future we need people with diverse backgrounds, perspectives, and abilities. That’s why we’re committed to creating a workplace where all kinds of people can do their best work. It’s when everyone’s voice is heard and valued that we’re inspired to go beyond what’s been done before. https://www.oracle.com/corporate/careers/diversity-inclusion/

Career Level - IC2

Qualifications

Career Level - IC2

About Us

As a world leader in cloud solutions, Oracle uses tomorrow’s technology to tackle today’s challenges. We’ve partnered with industry-leaders in almost every sector—and continue to thrive after 40+ years of change by operating with integrity.

We know that true innovation starts when everyone is empowered to contribute. That’s why we’re committed to growing an inclusive workforce that promotes opportunities for all.

Oracle careers open the door to global opportunities where work-life balance flourishes. We offer competitive benefits based on parity and consistency and support our people with flexible medical, life insurance, and retirement options. We also encourage employees to give back to their communities through our volunteer programs.

We’re committed to including people with disabilities at all stages of the employment process. If you require accessibility assistance or accommodation for a disability at any point, let us know by emailing accommodation-request_mb@oracle.com or by calling +1 888 404 2494 in the United States.

Oracle is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability and protected veterans’ status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Oracle will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records pursuant to applicable law.

title: Junior Developer (S/4HANAGroup Reporting)
description_html:
We help the world run better

At SAP, we enable you to bring out your best. Our company culture is focused on collaboration and a shared passion to help the world run better. How? We focus every day on building the foundation for tomorrow and creating a workplace that embraces differences, values flexibility, and is aligned to our purpose-driven and future-focused work. We offer a highly collaborative, caring team environment with a strong focus on learning and development, recognition for your individual contributions, and a variety of benefit options for you to choose from.

Meet Your Team

S/4HANA Finance is a central piece of SAP’s flagship product and lies at the core of our vision of the Intelligent Enterprise, which brings together machine and human intelligence across all business functions to deliver value to our customers. S/4HANA Finance is built, in the first place, as a cloud product with quarterly release cycles and is also shipped as an On-Premise version. Line of Business (LoB) Finance is a global development organization responsible for delivering this next generation Finance solution and works closely together with partners and customers to enable superior future-proof business models and finance processes. Within LoB Finance the Group Reporting unit is developing a solution used by large globally active corporations to create consolidated financial results and to publish group related information to the stock market, management and investors. Our development teams are based in Paris, Shanghai, Brno, and Walldorf.

The Group Reporting solution comprises application parts residing within S/4HANA as well as components built on SAP Cloud Platform. Currently we’re seeking a Junior Developer to further strengthen one of our Brno scrum teams working in the S/4HANA environment applying agile software engineering practices.

What You'll Do

Upon joining our development scrum team as Junior Developer (f/m/d) you will be thoroughly trained in all technical, functional and business process related topics, which you require for a smooth start. An experienced colleague from the same team will be your mentor and happy to support you in taking over full responsibility for tasks such as

  • Design, implement, test (automated and manually) and maintain specific product features, primarily in the S/4HANA backend (ABAP), and adhering to high quality standards required for developing cloud applications
  • Analyze and resolve issues identified during tests, upgrades or customer projects
  • Contribute to quality assurance, test automation and performance improvements
  • Analyze and resolve issues identified during tests, upgrades, or productive customer usage.
  • Act as trusted advisor providing expertise to team members, product managers, management and other stakeholders.
  • Ramp up your business process, technical and functional domain knowledge in selected areas of financial consolidation and S/4HANA Group Reporting, resp.

What You Bring

You have graduated in computer science, business informatics, engineering, natural sciences, mathematics or related field. You bring very good analytical and problem-solving skills.

Required Skills

  • Proficiency in at least one back-end programming language such as Python, JavaScript (Node.js), Java, C#, PHP, or Go is required
  • Quick learning, outstanding analytical and complex problem-solving skills
  • Fluency (written & spoken) in English

Preferred Skills

  • Knowledge in financial reporting, accounting or consolidation
  • Experience with ABAP development
  • Fiori and UI development skills
  • Master / bachelor’s degree in computer science, mathematics, engineering, business administration

or related field

Bring out your best

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.

We win with inclusion

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better and more equitable world.

SAP is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provide accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.

EOE AA M/F/Vet/Disability

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, age, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability.

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.

title: PLC Programmer
description_html:
At ABB, we help industries outrun - leaner and cleaner. Here, progress is an expectation - for you, your team, and the world. As a global market leader, we’ll give you what you need to make it happen. It won’t always be easy, growing takes grit. But at ABB, you’ll never run alone. Run what runs the world.

This Position reports to:

Department Manager




PLC Programmer

Connect your career with ABB – a global company contributing to the transformation of society and industry towards a more productive and sustainable future.

We are looking for candidates for the position of PLC Programmer at the ABB Operational Center Europe, with branches in Ostrava, Plzeň, and Brno.

In this role, you will work on industrial automation projects in areas such as:

  • Energy, including green energy
  • Marine transportation
  • Mining and mineral processing
  • Pharmaceuticals and chemicals

Examples of real projects we’ve worked on:

  • Jansz-Io project – natural gas extraction using unique subsea power station technology enabling a lower carbon footprint
  • Northvolt project – battery production with an 80% lower carbon footprint compared to fossil fuel-based manufacturing
  • Wonder of the Seas project – complete automation for the world’s largest cruise ship

The work model for the role is: hybrid

This role is contributing to the Process Automation in Ostrava, Plzeň or Brno

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Programming control applications based on functional specifications
  • Function testing internally and with customers
  • Commissioning equipment at customer sites
  • Documenting project progress and creating technical documentation


Qualifications For The Role

  • At least a high school education in electrical engineering
  • Experience in automation and PLC programming (we provide training for graduates)
  • English at a communicative level (collaboration with international customers and teams)
  • Willingness to travel – business trips within Europe
  • Independence and motivation to work in an international team


Benefits

We also offer our employees the following benefits:

  • Flexible working hours
  • Working hours of 7.5 hours/day
  • Possibility of working from home (Home Office) with a financial contribution
  • 25 days of vacation
  • Annual financial bonus
  • Annual salary review
  • Meal allowance
  • Contribution to the benefits portal (2-3% of monthly salary)
  • Opportunity for further career growth in the Czech Republic and worldwide
  • MultiSport card
  • Opportunity for education – internal/external professional courses, language courses, and conferences
  • Reward for recommending a new employee, on work anniversaries, or upon retirement
  • Company events (Christmas party, teambuilding, family days, and more)
  • Assistance line – professional psychological counseling
  • Extra leave for extraordinary life events and support for expectant parents
  • Office with good transport accessibility
  • Company parking for employees commuting from outside Ostrava
  • Possibility to take yoga classes directly at the workplace
  • Table football and darts directly at the workplace
  • Accident insurance
  • Discounts on ABB electrical installation materials
  • Discounts with our partners (electronics, gastronomy, car purchases, train transport, etc.)

A Future Opportunity

Please note that this position is part of our talent pipeline and not an active job opening at this time. By applying, you express your interest in future career opportunities with ABB.

We value people from different backgrounds. Could this be your story? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about us and see the impact of our work across the globe.

title: Kóder newsletterových šablon
description_html:
Do týmu MAFRA hledáme šikovného front-end kodéra, který se postará o tvorbu responzivních e-mailových šablon pro newsletterovou komunikaci. Pokud tě baví kódovat, sleduješ aktuální trendy v HTML/CSS a víš, co funguje v e-mailových klientech, pak hledáme právě tebe!

Náplň práce

  • Kódovat responzivní HTML šablony pro newslettery (zejména pro redakční týmy – iDNES.cz, Metro, Harper´s Bazaar, Cosmopolitan a další.),
  • optimalizovat šablony pro různé e-mailové klienty (Outlook, Gmail, Apple Mail…),
  • spolupráce s e-mailingovým specialistou.

Co očekáváme?

  • Zkušenosti s HTML/CSS – ideálně specificky s e-mailovým prostředím,
  • znalost principů responzivního designu,
  • zkušenosti s testováním e-mailů napříč klienty (např. Email on Acid výhodou),
  • smysl pro detail a chuť hledat řešení i tam, kde Outlook dělá potíže 🙂,

Co nabízíme?

  • Zázemí stabilní mediální skupiny MAFRA,
  • možnost práce na dálku / hybridně,
  • spolupráci na zajímavých a viditelných projektech s velkým dosahem,
  • přístup k moderním nástrojům a technologiím,
  • fajn tým, který ocení tvou práci a nenechá tě v tom.

Budeme se těšit na tvé CV :-)

Místo pracoviště Karla Engliše 519/11, 15000 Praha - Smíchov, Česká republika

Typ pracovního vztahu Práce na plný úvazek

Typ smluvního vztahu Práce na živnostenský list (IČO)

Požadované jazyky Čeština (výborná), Angličtina (středně pokročilá)

Požadované vzdělání Středoškolské nebo odborné vyučení s maturitou

title: IT Trainee
description_html:
Introduction

A career in IBM Consulting is rooted by long-term relationships and close collaboration with clients across the globe. You'll work with visionaries across multiple industries to improve the hybrid cloud and AI journey for the most innovative and valuable companies in the world. Your ability to accelerate impact and make meaningful change for your clients is enabled by our strategic partner ecosystem and our robust technology platforms across the IBM portfolio

Your Role And Responsibilities

You Will Have The Opportunity To

Bachelor's Degree

title: Generative AI&ML Engineer
description_html:
Hledáš tým, kde se nebudeš ztrácet v korporátním kolečku, ale tvoje práce bude opravdu vidět? 🚀

Přidej se k nám – v Dawiso vyvíjíme vlastní platformu na správu dat, kde má každý kódovaný řádek přímý dopad na zákazníky po celé Evropě.

Aktuálně hledáme Generative AI & ML Engineera. 

Co budeš dělat

  • Pracovat s nejnovějšími LLM modely

  • Vytvářet AI agenty, kteří řeší reálné problémy

  • Navrhovat AI workflow pro automatizaci komplexních procesů

  • Pracovat s MCP a dalšími nově vznikajícími technologiemi

  • Provádět analýzu dat pomocí AI asistentů pro okamžité insighty

  • Testovat hypotézy v řádu dnů, ne měsíců

  • Implementovat sémantické vyhledávání


Co od tebe očekáváme

title: DevOps/Operations Specialist - automatizace a správa v Azure
description_html:
Do našeho DevSecOps týmu hledáme novou posilu, která bude mít klíčovou roli v rozvoji i udržování stability projektů u jednoho z našich dlouhodobých zákazníků.
Nemusíš být expert na všechno – hledáme především někoho, kdo má dobrý technický základ, dokáže převzít odpovědnost, přemýšlí v souvislostech a může naskočit už během listopadu / nepozději na začátku prosince.

Pokud tě láká prostředí, kde se učíš praxí – na reálných projektech pro české i zahraniční zákazníky – čti dál!

Mimo projekt samotný se můžeš těšit i na spolupráci se zkušeným kolegou Pavlem Stejskalem.

Čemu se budeš věnovat:

  • Vývoji a údržbě automatizačních procesů v rámci Azure DevOps Pipelines
  • Správě dokumentace základních procesů mezi Adastrou a zákazníkem (onboarding, role, povinnosti …)
  • Aktivní identifikaci slabých míst v rámci DevSecOps aktivit u projektů
  • Řešení problémů na CI/CD a aplikační infrastruktuře (Azure Pipelines, Azure AKS)
  • Práci s ticketovacím systémem zákazníka a delegování problémů na odpovědné týmy s adekvátním popisem problému
  • Budeš spolupracovat s vývojáři, architekty a projekťáky napříč projekty

Budeme si rozumět, pokud:

  • Máš zkušenosti s Azure Cloud a Azure DevOps
  • Umíš pracovat s Git a chápeš principy CI/CD
  • Zvládneš číst i psát v YAML a Pythonu (alespoň na nějaké úrovni)
  • Dokážeš si organizovat práci a prioritizovat úkoly
  • Máš smysl pro detail, přemýšlíš kriticky a dokážeš chápat procesy (skutečné i popsané v dokumentaci)
  • Jsi komunikativní a zvládneš se domluvit v ANJ

Výhodu budeš mít, pokud:

  • Máš zkušenost s Terraform nebo Ansible (++)
  • Už jsi pracoval s nějakým ticketovacím systémem (např. Jira, ServiceNow)

Proč věříme, že ti v Adastře bude dobře:

  • Jsme stabilní mezinárodní firma s multiprojektovým prostředím, která pořád roste
  • Pod jednou střechou sdružujeme špičkové technologie a zkušené experty ze všech možných IT odvětví
  • Jednáme spolu na rovinu a ceníme si proaktivního přístupu
  • Sídlíme v krásných kancelářích Mississippi House v Karlíně

Mimo to se můžeš těšit na:

  • Neformální atmosféru – po práci se potkáváme na společenských i sportovních akcích (a těch není zrovna málo)
  • 25 dnů volna do začátku a každý rok ti k nim přidáme jeden den volna navíc
  • Flexibilní pracovní dobu i home office – vše podle domluvy
  • Lekce angličtiny, pokud se v ní potřebuješ zlepšit
  • Široké možnosti vzdělávání – tréninky, přednášky, webináře i certifikace
  • Měsíční příspěvek do Cafeterie, který můžeš využít na různé volnočasové aktivity nebo na Multisport kartu
  • Příspěvek na stravování
  • V kuchyňkách najdeš výbornou kávu, velký výběr čajů i jiné nápoje + ovocné a svačinové bedýnky plné dobrot
  • Slevy u našich partnerů – ať už jde o elektroniku, kulturu či služby
  • Dny FIT Adastra, protože nám záleží na tvém zdraví – můžeš využít odborná vyšetření, konzultace a různé aktivity pro podporu fyzické i psychické kondice
  • Rádi podporujeme, když chceš pomáhat, takže dostaneš 1 den placeného volna navíc na dobrovolnické aktivity dle svého výběru
  • Placené volno navíc, pokud doprovázíš svého prvňáčka v první školní den
  • Chceš procestovat svět, napsat knihu nebo si jen dát pauzu? Po 3 letech u nás si můžeš vzít Sabbatical leave
  • Štědrý referral program, pokud nám pomůžeš najít nové Adastřany

title: Development and Test Engineer Automotive
description_html:
Jsme nová pražská pobočka německé společnosti EVOMOTIV. V Německu se těšíme skvělé pověsti u zákazníků i zaměstnanců díky svým výborným výsledkům a otevřené firemní kultuře. Tento trend jsme vloni přenesli i do ČR a v naší pražské kanceláři jsme začali realizovat projekty s vysokou přidanou hodnotou. Inovujeme, do tradičních systémů vnášíme nové technologie a postupy. AI pro nás není buzzword, ale aktivně ji implementujeme do našich projektů. Právě teď máš příležitost stát se součástí stále ještě nového týmu EVOMOTIV a otisknout se tak navždy do jejího dalšího směřování. Hledáme vývojové a testovací inženýry, kteří mají drive a chuť budovat kvalitní značku. Na českém trhu s německým parťákem v zádech.

CO BUDE NÁPLNÍ TVÉ PRÁCE?

  • Budeš vyvíjet a integrovat nejen automobilové mechatronické systémy, jako je ADAS, podvozky a elektrické řídící systémy. Máš příležitost tak přímo ovlivnit posun celého odvětví na další úroveň.
  • Budeš hledat nová, chytrá řešení a ověřovat jejich funkčnost a spolehlivost v systémech aut.
  • Pracovat budeš na projektech předních evropských automobilek - Tvé nápady se zhmotní v nových vozech.
  • Také budeš komunikovat s týmy zákazníků i s kolegy v Německu - v mezinárodním prostředí tak za chvíli budeš jako doma.
  • V blízké době se můžeš podílet i na testování aut v testovacích centrech v jiných zemích Evropy - občasné cestování tak bude součástí Tvé práce.

CO OD TEBE OČEKÁVÁME?

  • Jsi nadšenec a práce s nejnovějšími automotive mechatronickými systémy je Tvojí vášní.
  • Úspěšně jsi dokončil inženýrský stupeň studia některého z technických oborů (automotive, mechatronika, elektro- nebo strojní inženýrství, IT a další), nebo jsi středoškolák s pár lety praxe.
  • Mluvíš plynule česky a anglicky. Máš navíc znalost němčiny? Ideální!

NA CO SE U NÁS MŮŽEŠ TĚŠIT

Naše EVOMOTIV firemní kultura Ti umožní ideálně skloubit práci a volný čas:

  • s pružnou pracovní dobou si práci naplánuješ, jak potřebuješ - stačí se domluvit s týmem
  • home-office nebo práci na dálku budeš moci kombinovat dle svých potřeb a potřeb projektu
  • 5 týdnů dovolené ti zajistí dostatek času na relax dle vlastních preferencí

Chceme, aby ses i v práci cítil/-a jako doma:

  • Máme otevřenou firemní kulturu, kde si lidé váží jeden druhého.
  • Posloucháme se navzájem - tvůj názor je pro nás důležitý.
  • Pracujeme v moderním prostředí Port7 v pražských Holešovicích - máme krásné kanceláře s terasou, s metrem na jedné a cyklostezkou na druhé straně a s nabídkou kulturních akcí přímo v areálu.

Více si o naší firemní kultuře můžeš přečíst zde.

Jdeš do toho s námi? Pošli nám svůj životopis v angličtině! Těšíme se na Tebe!
